title: quetzalia contracta
side_effects: Quetzalia contracta can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, gastrointestinal issues, and cardiovascular problems. Some examples of potential side effects include dizziness, nausea, and vomiting, particularly if the plant is ingested in large quantities or without proper preparation. Long-term use or misuse of the plant may also lead to kidney damage, liver dysfunction, or even coma in severe cases. It is essential to consult a medical professional or a qualified herbalist before using Quetzalia contracta or any other plant for medicinal purposes.
